'''bawudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zambuk|zambuk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zambuk|zambuk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bawudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæwidhith|bæwidhith]] || [[word:bæwidhij|bæwidhij]] || [[word:bæwidhish|bæwidhish]] || [[word:bæwidhi|bæwidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawuwudhuth|bawuwudhuth]] || [[word:bawuwudhuj|bawuwudhuj]] || [[word:bawuwudhush|bawuwudhush]] || [[word:bawuwudhu|bawuwudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawudhuth|bawudhuth]] || [[word:bawudhuj|bawudhuj]] || [[word:bawudhush|bawudhush]] || [[word:bawudhu|bawudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawufdhuth|bawufdhuth]] || [[word:bawufdhuj|bawufdhuj]] || [[word:bawufdhush|bawufdhush]] || [[word:bawufdhuf|bawufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bawudhuthu|bawudhuthu]] || [[word:bawudhuju|bawudhuju]] || [[word:bawudhushu|bawudhushu]] || [[word:bawudhuku|bawudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bawudhuth|bawudhuth]] || [[word:bawudhuj|bawudhuj]] || [[word:bawudhush|bawudhush]] || [[word:bawudhu|bawudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bawudhuthul|bawudhuthul]] || [[word:bawudhujul|bawudhujul]] || [[word:bawudhushul|bawudhushul]] || [[word:bawudhukul|bawudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bawudhuthuthu|bawudhuthuthu]] || [[word:bawudhujuju|bawudhujuju]] || [[word:bawudhushushu|bawudhushushu]] || [[word:bawudhuku|bawudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bawudhuthun|bawudhuthun]] || [[word:bawudhujun|bawudhujun]] || [[word:bawudhushun|bawudhushun]] || [[word:bawudhukun|bawudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bawudhuthuoro|bawudhuthuoro]] || [[word:bawudhujuoro|bawudhujuoro]] || [[word:bawudhushuoro|bawudhushuoro]] || [[word:bawudhukuoro|bawudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
